title: rhododendron × kesselringii
intro: Rhododendron × kesselringii, also known as Kessel's hybrid rhododendron, is a hybrid plant that belongs to the family Ericaceae, derived from the cross between Rhododendron ponticum and Rhododendron hirsutum. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly its leaves which contain flavonoids and other compounds that exhibit anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits associated with Rhododendron × kesselringii include its potential in treating various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues, as well as its ability to act as an anti-oxidant and anti-inflammatory agent. Traditional herbal preparations of Rhododendron × kesselringii include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
